offer: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, disorganized expense tracking causes late payments. We automate expense categorization instead of manual expense tracking and reporting.
problem: Difficulty in tracking and categorizing expenses from various sources.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers seeking help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on expense tracking
DM outreach to freelancers with a demo video
Share insights in freelancer-focused community forums
try_it: Let users try receipt scanning and expense categorization on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing expense data
Provide one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
